message:
fix(fsfs): use BTreeSet for deterministic path ordering in PendingEvents

Replace HashSet<PathBuf> with BTreeSet<PathBuf> in the by_time map of
PendingEvents. This ensures that when multiple filesystem events share
the same timestamp, they are processed in a deterministic (sorted) order
rather than an arbitrary hash-dependent order. Deterministic iteration
is important for correctness when concurrent agents consume pending
watcher events, preventing non-reproducible event processing sequences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
